headline: BUILT INSPECTION-READY FROM DAY ONE
subheading: A senior QP's phased roadmap from scope and licensing to MHRA pre-licensing inspection.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a greenfield pharmaceutical site coming to life through sequenced, gated phases. A clean, premium aerial-blueprint metaphor: five luminous milestone nodes connected along an ascending pathway that rises from a faint architectural facility outline toward a glowing endpoint, suggesting a staged journey to readiness. Translucent layered glass planes overlap like building blocks stacking into a structured framework, each plane carrying soft geometric grids, contour lines and abstract validation-style charts. Stainless-steel and frosted-glass material textures, sealed clean-room panel forms and precise architectural linework recede into a deep navy background, while teal and cyan light traces the connecting pathway and node rings. A single fresh-green accent glow marks the final milestone, signalling approval and go-live. Calm, authoritative, sterile-yet-warm atmosphere, shallow depth with soft bokeh and reflective surfaces, clinical-luxury mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
